en.extract:
The white-winged swamp warbler (Bradypterus carpalis), also known as the white-winged scrub-warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae.  It is found in Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia.  Its natural habitat is swamps.

The '''white-winged swamp warbler''' ('''''Bradypterus carpalis'''''), also known as the '''white-winged scrub-warbler''', is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Locustellidae]].  It is found in [[Burundi]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo]], [[Kenya]], [[Rwanda]], [[Tanzania]], [[Uganda]], and [[Zambia]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is [[swamp]]s.
